explanations.12: The style prop is using inline CSS with hex color codes — #07ac2aff is green and #eeff00ff is yellow, with 'ff' at the end meaning fully opaque (not transparent).
explanations.15: button-group--block makes the buttons stretch to fill their container width instead of staying narrow.
explanations.16: button--primary, button--secondary, and button--info are CSS class names that apply different visual styles to each button (colors, borders, etc.).
